title: Sculk X Spore
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/010e5bbcb7ad4fe223959f5c2880114d2443a44b.png)
**Unleash The Sculk Horde By Visting Their Tomb In The Middle Of The World, Fight Against Two Battling Infections At Once (Find Sculk Tomb At Cords 0, 0, 0 )**
# Features

- 🔫 - Craft Guns To Takedown Hard Enemies (TaCZ)
- 🌑 - Find A Sculk Tomb To Start The Infection (Sculk Horde)
- 🚁 - Build Planes & Helicopters To Fly Around (Simply Planes)
- 💧 - Manage Your Thirst And Temperature (Tough As Nails)
- 🔆 - Make Matchboxes To Light Torches (Realistic Torches)
- ⚫ - Survive In Pitch Black Darkness (True Darkness)
- 🏕️ - Explore New Biomes (Terralith)
- 🩸 - Use Bandages To Heal (First Aid)
- 🎒 - Store Items In Backpacks (Sophisticated Backpacks)
- 🏙️ - Optional City World Type (Lost Cities)
